summary: Verified the corrected currency-controls swap on Dishonored 2 RPG inventory app. MAGIC side currency (MPE) shows editable input + '/ max' label + RESET only (no +/-); MUNDANE side currency (Gold Sovereign) shows -100/-10/-1 + editable input + +1/+10/+100 only (no RESET, no /max). All regression items also pass.

Regression.cast_button_regression: NOT DIRECTLY RE-TESTED THIS ITERATION - starter Corvo has no seeded magic abilities so no cast-btn-<name> rendered; iteration 10 had already verified CAST. Currency swap change does not touch ItemRow CAST logic.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: data-testid uses unencoded spaces (e.g. 'currency-Gold Sovereign'). Works but consider id-based testids like already done for category tabs, to be consistent and avoid future selector escaping issues.

Minor: testid concatenation produces 'currency-Gold Sovereign--100' (double dash for negatives, single dash before '+'). Pattern works but is unintuitive; an explicit delimiter like 'currency-<name>-delta-<n>' would be cleaner.
seed_data_creation: None - used starter Corvo character + starter currencies (Gold Sovereign mundane, MPE magic).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Open Corvo by double-clicking the roster card. MUNDANE/MAGIC side toggles at the top use data-testids side-toggle-mundane / side-toggle-magic. Currency strip is below the character name. Category tabs are id-based (tab-<categoryId>) plus tab-everything and tab-new-category. The CAST flow on magic side was not directly retested here because the starter Corvo has no seeded magic abilities; if asked again, create a magic ability via + NEW ABILITY, set MPE cost in item dialog, then exercise cast-btn-<name>.
rca of the issue: Previous swap bug was that MAGIC currency had the +/- buttons and MUNDANE had the RESET/max. The current InventoryView.jsx now correctly branches on side==='magic' to render input + '/max' + RESET, and on mundane to render -/+ buttons + input only. Verified via UI: MPE shows RESET and no adjust buttons; Gold Sovereign shows all six adjust buttons and no RESET.
